text: A photograph of a residential area featuring a traditional house with a red tiled roof and decorative white trim. A large, dark tree dominates the background. A low, red metal fence runs across the foreground, separating the viewer from the property. Laundry is hanging on the fence. A portion of a black motorcycle is visible on the right side.
